template.p: Welcome to the Odoo Therapy Practice package!
This module provides a comprehensive suite of applications tailored to the needs of therapy practices, empowering you to manage your business efficiently and deliver exceptional patient care.
By installing this package, you'll have access to a range of essential apps, including CRM, Appointment and Invoicing. Let's explore how these modules can streamline your therapy practice operations.
Getting Started To begin, you'll find the key applications you need on your Odoo dashboard. Let's take a closer look at how you can use these tools.
You can access every installed App in your Odoo database on your main dashboard.

ul.li: Appointments App: Offer seamless online booking for consultations and sessions, allowing clients to schedule time with you 24/7.

font.span: CRM App: Nurture long-term relationships by tracking client interactions, preferences, and follow-up reminders in one central hub.
Knowledge App: Securely store and organize detailed patient notes, treatment plans, and holistic health records for easy reference.

ul.li: Calendar App: Manage your daily schedule efficiently, avoiding double bookings and ensuring you have adequate preparation time between clients.
Invoicing App: Simplify your finances by generating professional invoices for sessions and packages, ensuring you get paid on time.
Contacts App: Maintain a clean and organized directory of all your clients, suppliers, and professional partners.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 ms-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: Odoo is entirely integrated into an App. Download it to turn your phone to manage your entire business in it.

template.p: By uploading this module's demo data, your database has been filled with a few contacts.
You should be able to execute the following flows to have an overview of various flows you can quickly execute with this package using Odoo.
Of course, this is just an overview of the features included in this package. Feel free to add new apps, delete/modify demo data, and test everything around!

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-warning pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 ms-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You didn't import demo data? You can still do it. Go to Apps > Industries > Upgrade your Therapy Practice package and check the related box.

template.p: You receive a call from a new potential patient, Emily, who is interested in your therapy services.
In the CRM App, you create a new lead for Emily, capturing her contact information and the reason for her inquiry.
As you qualify Emily's needs, you update the lead status to "Qualified" in the CRM pipeline.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You can also configure an email alias so everyone sending email to this one will create a new opportunity for you.
To do so, go to CRM > Configuration > Sales Teams.

template.p: From any opportunity, the next step is to easily send an invitation to book an appointment with you.
To do that easily, you have two possibilities :

1. Canned responses
Click "Send message", then type "::" in the message content to display canned responses in the system. Then just select the one you want, click send, and the customer receives the message! It's that easy!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: To create, edit and delete existing canned responses, just open the Discuss App, then go to Configuration > Canned Responses and set up the message you'd like to easily send.

template.p: Click "Send message", then click the "Expand" button on the bottom right of the composer.
This opens up the Mail composer. Once you're in the composer, just press the three dot icon in the toolbar, then choose your desired email template.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: Email templates can be set up in the Email Templates technical menu. To access it, admins can enable debug mode and search for the "Email Templates" menu from the homescreen.

template.p: Give both options a shot!
If you want to share your calendar easily, navigate to the Appointment App and select "Share" on the Edit Button.
After each appointment, you can use the same methods to plan your next session with your patient.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You may also create a personalized website in a few clicks by adding the Website App, your appointment page will be automatically added.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You can set the consultation with an upfront online payment. Activate it in your Appointment Type Settingsby setting up an upfront payment method.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: If you want to adapt your flow and set new automation rules, click the Gear Icon in the top of a CRM column and select "Automation", or add automated email in your Appointment Type.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: To reduce your no show rate drastically, appointments automatically comes with reminders by Email and SMS.

template.p: Once the appointment is booked, navigate to the Calendar App. You may find the new appointment. You can also move it (Emily will be notified) or cancel it.
The Appointment App is automatically updated based on your Calendar. You can easily lock slots, change appointment times and send communication to your patients fromthe Calendar App.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: The Odoo Calendar App is compatible with Outlook and Google Calendar. Activate the sync in the Calendar App settings.

template.p: Using Odoo, you can easily take notes during your appointments.
Any meeting within Odoo contains a "Notes" field. Type, upload images, create tables, and much more.
You can even start a sound recording using the "/voice transcript" command !
Alternatively, you can also use the "Log Note" button on your contacts or create a specific knowledge article (like this one) for each of your patients.
If you navigate to the Invoice App, you can manage your invoices. You have many possibilities to streamline your invoicing process:

ul.li: Auto-post your invoice on a regular basis.
Add an upfront payment in your Appointment Type.
Add the Subscription App and invoice automatically based on a subscription type.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 ms-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You completed that demo use case! There are millions of other ways to adapt your Odoo setup to fit your business needs.
Discover more about Odoo by diving into our documentation and academy, and feel free to request a demo if you need help!

span.strong: Do you want to go further?

template.p: Odoo offers you infinite possibilities, such as :

ul.li: Automated recurring invoicing with the Subscription App.
A free, personalized, integrated Website in a few clicks. Get new leads or direct appointment online in a few clicks.
Manage your team's and integrate them in all processes by adding the Employees App.
Manage your accounting easier than ever with a completely integrated environment. (Accounting App)
Manage all your communication channels in one place with Odoo Marketing Automation ,Email Marketing, Social Media Marketing , and SMS Marketing .
Organise your events and connect with your patients easily with the Events App .

template.p: These all go free in your current subscription; feel free to explore! 🙃

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 ms-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?
